purpose: Machine-readable release-readiness ledger for docs/source branch fixes, generated mission propagation, branch-specific caveats and Arma 2 OA smoke gates.

julyUpdateCandidates.releaseGate: Dedicated still publishes SERVER_FPS_GUI / WFBE_VAR_SERVER_FPS; hosted/listen exits before the publisher loops; Chernarus and maintained Vanilla parity are named before release wording.
Takistan boot/capture/JIP, server-side ownership/funds/upgrade/cap/range/base-protection rejection tests, economy debit/reward smoke and AA/radar counterplay are recorded before release wording.

generatedTargets.releaseGate: Edit here first, then prove maintained generated targets carry intended fixes before release wording.

generatedTargets.releaseGate: Run or inspect LoadoutManager propagation, verify generated version.sqf, inspect generated diffs and smoke Arma 2 OA before release wording.
Use the Zargabad branch audit; static validation passed on e9294ede, but runtime, screenshot, RPT, HC/JIP and whitespace gates remain open.

generatedTargetPolicy.defaultReleaseScope: Stable release claims cover source Chernarus plus maintained generated Vanilla Takistan unless a branch-specific audit says otherwise.
generatedTargetPolicy.moddedReleaseGate: Do not claim Modded_Missions support while modded generation is commented, packaging omits Modded_Missions, generated version.sqf files are absent and conflict/bootstrap blockers remain.
generatedTargetPolicy.freshCheckoutGate: Because version.sqf is git-ignored but included by mission boot files, every target mission root needs generated version.sqf verification before pack/test claims.
generatedTargetPolicy.packagingScope: While Tools/LoadoutManager/ZipManager.cs:16 remains unchanged, _MISSIONS.7z packaging is expected to include Missions and Missions_Vanilla, not Modded_Missions.

versionSqfGeneratedInput.currentCheckoutEvidence: git status --ignored --short reports !! for source Chernarus and maintained Vanilla Takistan version.sqf files.
versionSqfGeneratedInput.whyItMatters: description.ext and initJIPCompatible.sqf include version.sqf before mission boot continues; a fresh checkout, clean pack or generated target without that file can fail before later SQF systems initialize.
versionSqfGeneratedInput.releaseGate: Before pack, smoke-test or release wording, verify every claimed mission target root has a generated version.sqf matching its terrain profile and player count.

toolingAuditGates.releaseGate: For release archives, require non-zero 7za exit-code handling, rollback-safe archive replacement and proof that _MISSIONS.7z contains the expected mission roots.
Inspect console output and generated diffs after propagation; treat generated targets as disposable unless the source/generator owns the files.
Use Analyze-PerformanceAudit.ps1 directly for automation; add streaming/large-log tests and a headless wrapper before calling the analyzer production-hardened.

Before production bot/extension claims, pin one GameData schema, add fixture tests, switch DiscordBot JSON intake away from TypeNameHandling.All and validate preferences/data-path loading before Discord startup.
Do not claim comprehensive BattlEye hardening from the repo; production needs owner-supplied BEpath/config inventory and OA-era filters beyond publicvariable.txt.

toolingGate.requirement: Run from a checkout with either an ancestor folder named a2waspwarfare or repo-root markers: Missions, Missions_Vanilla and Tools/LoadoutManager/LoadoutManager.csproj.

latestLoadoutManagerPropagationRun.scope: Generated/copied Chernarus and maintained Vanilla Takistan on the docs/source branch after source fixes.
latestLoadoutManagerPropagationRun.result: All five tracked fixes are present in docs/source Chernarus and propagated to docs/source maintained Vanilla Takistan; this is not a stable-master or release-branch guarantee, and Arma 2 OA smoke remains pending.

nonFatalWarnings.message: The specified content was not found in the file.
nonFatalWarnings.impact: Did not stop Chernarus/Takistan generation or the tracked fix propagation; treat as help-menu title replacement drift unless future evidence says otherwise.

globalReleaseRule: A fix or branch feature is not release-complete until the target branch is named, Chernarus source carries the intended change, maintained Vanilla carries the same intended change when propagation matters, generated diffs are inspected and the relevant Arma 2 OA smoke is recorded.

docsSource.meaning: Chernarus and maintained Vanilla carry the documented propagation batch.

stableMaster.meaning: Stable baseline; does not carry hosted FPS loop exit, supply scan narrowing, client Skill_Init idempotency, paratrooper marker registration or commander-built ARTY ownership.

releaseBranch.meaning: Current release head now carries paratrooper marker registration, single Skill_Init, hosted FPS guard/removal and narrowed supply scan in both maintained missions; the latest delta replaces the old FPS-only menu slot with a GPS toggle; commander-built ARTY ownership still remains absent in both release maintained missions. Arma smoke remains pending.
